title: RFC 7807 Problem Details
description: Error response format following RFC 7807 (Problem Details for HTTP APIs).

type.description: A URI reference identifying the problem type. DDISA errors use https://ddisa.org/errors/<type>, OpenAPE errors use https://openape.org/errors/<type>.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence.

instance.description: A URI reference identifying the specific occurrence.
